title: Reis Book
wikitext:
[]: Rei's Book ? (Spoilers please !)             Quote Post by Armitage » Sun Nov 29, 2009 2:33 pm Probably already discussed but .. What is that ?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Nov 29, 2009 2:51 pm Whoa! Nice find! I can sort of see a suit and a tie.

[]:             Quote Post by Armitage » Sun Nov 29, 2009 2:54 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Whoa! Nice find! I can sort of see a suit and a tie.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Nov 29, 2009 2:58 pm It's an Angel. And there's been a few threads pointing this out. In fact, that same image was in the original series. So there's threads in both this forum, and the discussion forum.

[]:             Quote Post by Armitage » Sun Nov 29, 2009 2:58 pm Sachi wrote: It's an Angel. And there's been a few threads pointing this out. In fact, that same image was in the original series. So there's threads in both this forum, and the discussion forum.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Nov 29, 2009 3:02 pm It looks kinda like an Angelic Rei rapped in cloth with one hand up in the air like the old Religious pictures used to have.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Nov 29, 2009 3:04 pm I dont see Rei in that book image. Maybe an angel, but I cant make Rei out in that.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Nov 29, 2009 3:04 pm Armitage wrote: Where was it in the original series ?

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Nov 29, 2009 3:24 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: I dont see Rei in that book image. Maybe an angel, but I cant make Rei out in that.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Nov 29, 2009 3:27 pm The book that Rei is reading is The Happy Prince and Other Tales , by Oscar Wilde. I can't say if the book or any images in it is an insight to Rei's character or just a red herring by Anno. However, it turns out that Gainax did choose this book since there was a production drawing of the book itself. I don't have the production drawing, but I do remember seeing it when this subject was brought up before. I'm guessing that the image of the angel is a picture from the story, The Happy Prince. Basically, toward the end of the story an angel is sent by God to bring two of the most precious things in the city where the Happy Prince and his friend, the swallow, resided. The angel finds the body of the dead swallow and the lead heart of the prince. God says that the angel has chosen rightly and both the swallow and prince live in Heaven happily. Also, all the stories in the book have a constant theme of sacrifice. Considering that Rei sacrifices herself in the original Eva, it could be a clue about her overall role in Reuild. That or in my IMHO, the angel looks a little like Rei. If you want to learn more about the stories, here's the book's the wiki page: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Happy_Prince_and_Other_Tales

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 29, 2009 4:17 pm The book Rei's reading is called The Happy Prince and Other Tales, just fyi.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Nov 29, 2009 4:23 pm ^- The Goose had pointed it out.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sun Nov 29, 2009 4:51 pm Kinda looks like our good friend GNR...

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Nov 29, 2009 5:02 pm schismatics wrote: Kinda looks like our good friend GNR...

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Mon Nov 30, 2009 2:50 am There was a thread a REAL while back about this. It was the very first thread I posted in. EDIT: Here is a branch off of that thread solely about the book. EDIT 2: Whoa, Zuggy was actually helpful way back then! It's a real shame.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Mon Nov 30, 2009 11:27 am I can see Rei in it... But can no one else see a bandaged unit 01 face? [url]http://farm2.static.flickr.com/1151/1395340454_213b5cc167.jpg?v=0[/url] im seeing this with Rei infront of it? GET IT OUT OF MY HEAAAAAADD!
